_comment: Pinterest-optimized save-bait copy for each blog post. Consumed by scripts/generate-pins.js. Blog titles are SEO-tuned; pin titles need curiosity + specificity + emotion to earn saves. Each hook can optionally include a 'scene' field — a hand-crafted visual concept that overrides the generic category scene for richer Gemini prompts. See PINTEREST-STRATEGY.md §3 for rationale.

_patterns.authority_reveal: What I Wish I Knew Before {action}

_moods.cozy-warm: Moody natural light, warm ivory/caramel/rust tones, layered textiles, candles, deep shadows. Evokes an aspirational evening feeling. Best for bedroom/reading/lighting content.
_moods.scandi-bright: Bright natural daylight, white walls, light oak, clean minimal. Legacy default — good for tutorial/functional content.
_moods.earthy-neutral: Soft morning light, beige/terracotta/sage tones, linen textures, dried florals. Feels organic and calming. Best for biophilic/balcony/nursery content.
_moods.editorial-moody: Dramatic side-light, matte dark walls, brass accents, shadow play. Feels expensive and tailored. Best for color-drenching/small-living-room.
_moods.bright-fresh: Overcast diffuse light, cool whites, pale blue/green accents, crisp styling. Best for organization/storage/bathroom content.

_sceneGuide: Write scenes as if directing a photographer: specify the hero object, the surrounding elements, camera angle, and what's in the frame. 30-60 words. Imagen 4 responds well to concrete nouns + spatial relationships.
